chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4552 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.21020/2023. 2. For orders on Misc. No.21021/2023. 3. For orders on Misc. No.21022/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2023. Mr. Ghulam Hasnain, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, impugning the Order made by the learned Additional District Judge-VI, Malir, Karachi on 16.08.2023, allowing Civil Revision No.13/2020 filed by the Respondent No.1 so as to set aside the dismissal of an Application under Order XIII Rule 1 & 2 CPC read with Section 151 CPC in Civil Suit No.478/2015 and allow the production of certain documents that had been referred to in the written statement but had not been annexed therewith. On query posed to learned counsel for the Petitioner as to whether the documents sought to be produced by the Respondent No.1 had been fabricated or manipulated and what prejudice would be caused through their production if that were not so, no cogent response was forthcoming. Indeed, a perusal of the counter-affidavit filed in response to the underlying Application reflects that no substantial objection was raised, whether in that regard or otherwise. Under the given circumstances, we are of the view that the matter does not warrant interference in exercise of the Constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. 2 Hence, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with other pending miscellaneous applications.

JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
